summary: Dashboard displays correctly in error state with proper layout and functionality. Minor palette violations present but do not break core functionality or user experience.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/beige backgrounds instead of the required diner palette. Page background should use teal #9fd8d2 and cards should use cream #fff8ea from the diner palette.
The 'Resend verification email' button uses incorrect pink coloring that doesn't match the specified primary CTA button fill #ffb3c7 from the diner palette.

actions: Apply diner teal background #9fd8d2 to main dashboard area
Update card backgrounds to use cream #fff8ea instead of current neutral tones
Correct the verification email button to use proper diner pink CTA styling #ffb3c7
